business_ideas.idea: Micro-SaaS tools that help users dominate specific platforms; replicate Buffer/Jungle Scout success
Ghost.org marketed as WordPress + Substack alternative with full revenue transparency

predictions.text: In 10-30 years we will look back horrified that companies tracked user location without consent
Privacy is an inflection point; next generation won't tolerate current data practices
Apple's privacy pivot signals major market shift; Facebook's data advantage disappearing
